news.title:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.
news.summary:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.

news.title: Lodha Developers misses its FY26 pre-sales guidance due to the Iran war.
news.summary: Lodha Developers misses its FY26 pre-sales guidance due to the Iran war.

news.title: Lodha Developers misses FY26 pre-sales guidance by ₹470 crore, CNBC TV18 reports.
news.summary: Lodha Developers misses FY26 pre-sales guidance by ₹470 crore, CNBC TV18 reports.

news.title:
Lodha misses FY26 target by ₹470 crore due to real estate challenges.
Q4 sales for Lodha rise by 23%, showing growth despite hurdles.
news.summary:
Lodha misses FY26 target by ₹470 crore due to real estate challenges.
Q4 sales for Lodha rise by 23%, showing growth despite hurdles.

news.title:
Lodha Developers' Q4FY26 pre-sales rose 23% YoY to 58.9bn; FY26 pre-sales up 16% to 205.3bn.
Net debt reduced by 8bn to 53.7bn, with debt-equity ratio at 0.23x; FY26 collections grew 5% YoY to 151.6bn.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers' Q4FY26 pre-sales rose 23% YoY to 58.9bn; FY26 pre-sales up 16% to 205.3bn.
Net debt reduced by 8bn to 53.7bn, with debt-equity ratio at 0.23x; FY26 collections grew 5% YoY to 151.6bn.

news.title:
Nifty Realty index fell 24% in 2026 amid housing demand fears, IT sector uncertainty, and geopolitical risks.
Developers like Godrej Properties and Macrotech saw strong launches, but FY27 growth may slow with demand-supply challenges.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty index fell 24% in 2026 amid housing demand fears, IT sector uncertainty, and geopolitical risks.
Developers like Godrej Properties and Macrotech saw strong launches, but FY27 growth may slow with demand-supply challenges.

news.title:
Lodha Developers Ltd made partial principal and interest payments on NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Payments due on March 31, 2026, were processed early on March 30 due to a public holiday.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers Ltd made partial principal and interest payments on NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Payments due on March 31, 2026, were processed early on March 30 due to a public holiday.

news.title:
Lodha Developers issues 50,000 NCDs worth ₹500 Cr at 8.52% interest.
These NCDs will mature on March 31, 2036, and list on NSE.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers issues 50,000 NCDs worth ₹500 Cr at 8.52% interest.
These NCDs will mature on March 31, 2036, and list on NSE.

news.title:
Lodha Developers issued 50,000 secured NCDs worth ₹500 Cr at ₹1 Lakh/unit.
The 10-year NCDs mature on Mar 31, 2036, with 8.52% p.a. interest paid semi-annually.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers issued 50,000 secured NCDs worth ₹500 Cr at ₹1 Lakh/unit.
The 10-year NCDs mature on Mar 31, 2036, with 8.52% p.a. interest paid semi-annually.

news.title:
Macrotech Developers saw an NSE block trade of 682,555 shares worth Rs. 51.2 cr.
The trade was executed at approximately Rs. 750.00 per share.
news.summary:
Macrotech Developers saw an NSE block trade of 682,555 shares worth Rs. 51.2 cr.
The trade was executed at approximately Rs. 750.00 per share.

news.title:
Godrej Properties and Lodha Developers acquired 25+ land parcels in FY26, eyeing ₹1 lakh cr revenue.
Godrej targets ₹32.5k cr in sales bookings; Lodha aims for ₹21k cr, driven by strong housing demand.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties and Lodha Developers acquired 25+ land parcels in FY26, eyeing ₹1 lakh cr revenue.
Godrej targets ₹32.5k cr in sales bookings; Lodha aims for ₹21k cr, driven by strong housing demand.

news.title:
Macrotech Developers saw a NSE block trade of ~612,274 shares at Rs. 860.45.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 52.7 crores.
news.summary:
Macrotech Developers saw a NSE block trade of ~612,274 shares at Rs. 860.45.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 52.7 crores.

news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.

news.title:
Lodha Developers acquired rights to develop a luxury project in Malabar Hill for ₹106.1 crore, paying ₹37.4 crore in stamp duty.
Lodha's revenue rose 14.4% YoY to ₹4,672.5 crore in Q3 FY26, with record pre-sales of ₹5,620 crore, up 25% YoY.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers acquired rights to develop a luxury project in Malabar Hill for ₹106.1 crore, paying ₹37.4 crore in stamp duty.
Lodha's revenue rose 14.4% YoY to ₹4,672.5 crore in Q3 FY26, with record pre-sales of ₹5,620 crore, up 25% YoY.

news.title:
Lodha Developers to acquire an 80% stake in Solidrise Realty for ₹294.1 crore.
SRPL, incorporated in 2025, focuses on real estate in Pune; deal completes by Feb 16, 2026.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers to acquire an 80% stake in Solidrise Realty for ₹294.1 crore.
SRPL, incorporated in 2025, focuses on real estate in Pune; deal completes by Feb 16, 2026.

news.title:
Lodha Developers exceeded business development goals, enhancing bargaining power and balance sheet opportunities.
Net debt is expected to stay under 0.5x equity with plans for further reduction soon.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers exceeded business development goals, enhancing bargaining power and balance sheet opportunities.
Net debt is expected to stay under 0.5x equity with plans for further reduction soon.

news.title:
Lodha Developers targets INR 210B pre-sales; achieved INR 146B (70%) in 9 months.
Company expects 33% EBITDA margin and 20% pro forma ROE for the year.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers targets INR 210B pre-sales; achieved INR 146B (70%) in 9 months.
Company expects 33% EBITDA margin and 20% pro forma ROE for the year.

news.title:
Lodha Developers unveils Green DC Park Agreement to cut data center costs by 15%.
Turnkey data center prices drop to $6M/MW, below global range of $8M-$12M.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers unveils Green DC Park Agreement to cut data center costs by 15%.
Turnkey data center prices drop to $6M/MW, below global range of $8M-$12M.

news.title:
Lodha Developers Ltd reported no deviations in the utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25.
The company raised Rs 250 Cr in Nov 2025 and Rs 500 Cr in Sep 2025 via private placements.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers Ltd reported no deviations in the utilization of NCD proceeds for Q4 FY25.
The company raised Rs 250 Cr in Nov 2025 and Rs 500 Cr in Sep 2025 via private placements.

news.title:
Lodha Developers' Q3 net profit rose to ₹9.57B, missing estimates of ₹9.68B.
Q3 revenue surged 14.5% YoY to ₹46.7B from ₹40.8B, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
Lodha Developers' Q3 net profit rose to ₹9.57B, missing estimates of ₹9.68B.
Q3 revenue surged 14.5% YoY to ₹46.7B from ₹40.8B, showcasing strong growth.
